---
title: ""
pagetitle: "Philippe Sloksnath"
description: "Research & Teaching Assistant at the University of Zurich studying AI-based persuasion, misinformation, and media effects."
---

```{=html}
<div class="profile-header">
  <img src="images/philippe.jpg" class="profile-photo" alt="Philippe Sloksnath">
  <div class="profile-info">
    <p class="profile-name">Philippe Sloksnath</p>
    <p class="profile-role">Research &amp; Teaching Assistant</p>
    <p class="profile-dept">
      <a href="https://www.ikmz.uzh.ch/en/research/divisions/mediapsychology-and-methods/team/philippe-sloksnath.html" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Department of Communication and Media Research</a>,
      University of Zurich
    </p>
    <div class="profile-social">
      <a href="mailto:philippe.sloksnath@uzh.ch" aria-label="Email" data-tooltip="Email"><i class="bi bi-envelope"></i></a>
      <a href="https://github.com/sloegge" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" aria-label="GitHub" data-tooltip="GitHub"><i class="bi bi-github"></i></a>
      <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/philippe-sloksnath" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" aria-label="LinkedIn" data-tooltip="LinkedIn"><i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i></a>
      <a href="https://bsky.app/profile/philippesloksnath.bsky.social" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" aria-label="Bluesky" data-tooltip="Bluesky"><i class="bi bi-bluesky"></i></a>
      <a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?hl=de&user=80htikoAAAAJ" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" aria-label="Google Scholar" data-tooltip="Google Scholar"><i class="ai ai-google-scholar"></i></a>
      <a href="https://orcid.org/0009-0004-5792-6768" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" aria-label="ORCID" data-tooltip="ORCID"><i class="ai ai-orcid"></i></a>
      <a href="assets/cv.pdf" target="_blank" class="cv-badge" aria-label="CV" data-tooltip="Curriculum Vitae">CV</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

```{=html}
<nav class="section-nav">
  <a href="#publications">Publications</a>
  <a href="#preprints">Preprints</a>
  <a href="#career">Career</a>
</nav>
<span id="about"></span>
```

I am a Research and Teaching Assistant at the Department of Communication and Media Research, supervised by 
[Tobias Dienlin](https://www.tobiasdienlin.com/){target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"}
at University of Zurich. My research is situated in Communication Science, Psychology and Human–Computer Interaction. I care about statistical inference and transparent, reproducible research practices. Always happy to chat.

I am interested in understanding how AI systems influence human beliefs, attitudes and behavior, how this may impact our society and how AI-based persuasion relates to perceived autonomy. In particular, my research interests include:

- **AI-based persuasion:** I study how AI-generated content shapes attitudes and beliefs, and what makes AI-produced messages more or less persuasive than human-authored ones.

- **Misinformation:** I examine how we can improve people's detection of false or misleading information, and how it affects people's beliefs and decisions.

- **Human–computer interaction:** I explore how people engage with and form mental models of AI systems, including the social and psychological consequences of interacting with AI in everyday contexts.

- **Open science:** I value scientific integrity and strive to make my research as reliable, transparent, and reproducible as possible. Please reach out if anything is unclear, insufficiently reported, or not reproducible.

# Publications {#publications}

Coming soon.

# Preprints {#preprints}

::: {.preprints}
- Krämer, M. D., **Sloksnath, P.**, Andrae, R., Hungerbuehler, L., Hopwood, C. J., Haehner, P., & Bleidorn, W. (2026, April 18).
  *A systematic review and meta-analysis of personal and contextual characteristics related to time spent in solitude.*
  [Link](https://doi.org/10.31234/osf.io/gb58u_v1){target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"}
  
- Ruggeri, K., Valenzuela-Catarí, G., Polemiti, E., … **Sloksnath, P.**, … Macchia, L., Ashcroft-Jones, S., Pelica, S. (2025, November 9).
  *Global well-being in 2025: A multidimensional analysis of mental, financial, and social health in 92 countries.*
  [Link](https://doi.org/10.31234/osf.io/3jyda_v1){target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"}

- **Sloksnath, P.** (2025). *Delegating Moral Decisions to AI Systems.*
  Master’s thesis, University of Zurich.
  [Link](https://doi.org/10.5167/uzh-269413){target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"}

- Stock, F., Pelica, S., Ashcroft-Jones, S., Stablum, F., … **Sloksnath, P.**, … Ruggeri, K., Hertwig, R., Lorenz-Spreen, P. (2024, December 16).
  *People in 26 countries prefer individual control to commercial or governmental control over online choice architectures.*
  [Link](https://doi.org/10.31219/osf.io/haqu9_v1){target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"}
:::

## Career {#career}

```{=html}
<div class="career">

  <div class="career-entry">
    <div class="career-date">Since 06/2025</div>
    <div class="career-info">
      <p><strong>Division of Media Psychology and Methods</strong>, Department of Communication and Media Research, University of Zurich</p>
      <p>PhD Project: Examining media effects of AI-generated information, with a focus on influencing factors related to trustworthiness and persuasion</p>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="career-entry">
    <div class="career-date">05/2025 – 02/2026</div>
    <div class="career-info">
      <p><strong>IDea_LAB</strong>, University of Graz</p>
      <p>Statistical data analysis of pilot studies and experiments and visualizations with Prof. Dr. Markus Kneer</p>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="career-entry">
    <div class="career-date">06/2024 – 08/2024</div>
    <div class="career-info">
      <p><strong>Policy Research Group</strong>, University of Cambridge</p>
      <p>Visiting Research Student</p>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="career-entry">
    <div class="career-date">02/2024 – 04/2025</div>
    <div class="career-info">
      <p><strong>Division of Individual Differences and Assessment</strong>, Department of Psychology, University of Zurich</p>
      <p>Student Assistant / Tutor — Data curation and preparation, topic modelling, language processing, and meta-analysis on the topic of solitude with Dr. Michael D. Krämer. Tutor for the lecture on Test Theory with Dr. Lisa Wagner.</p>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="career-entry">
    <div class="career-date">09/2022 – 04/2025</div>
    <div class="career-info">
      <p><strong>Conaptis GmbH</strong>, Switzerland — Project Assistant (40%)</p>
      <p>Support in projects concerning the implementation of occupational health management, workshops, and lectures, as well as administrative tasks</p>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="career-entry">
    <div class="career-date">11/2019 – 10/2022</div>
    <div class="career-info">
      <p><strong>Schweizer Radio und Fernsehen SRF</strong>, Switzerland — Staff Archive (40%)</p>
      <p>Revision of formal metadata in the archive database</p>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>
```
